name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with the installation scripts
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## System Information
- **macOS Version**: (run `sw_vers`)
- **Architecture**: Intel / Apple Silicon (run `uname -m`)
- **Package Tier**: light / standard / advanced
- **Shell**: zsh / bash

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `./install.sh --package ...`
2. ...
3. ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Error Logs
```
Paste relevant logs from logs/install-*.log here
```

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I am running on macOS 12 (Monterey) or later
- [ ] I have included the error logs
